rationales.hook_strength: 'Puts calcium right' is concrete and slightly contrarian, but 'Most people have never heard of it' undersells — K2 is well-known in supplement circles now.
rationales.clarity: Each slide is one mechanism, one action — traffic cop → K2 activates → artery angle → pair with D → food sources is a clean logical ladder.
rationales.audience_fit: Busy 25-year-olds who take D3 will immediately recognize the gap this fills, though the artery angle skews slightly older.
rationales.novelty: K2/D3 pairing and MK-7 callout are standard supplement-savvy content at this point — the 'traffic cop' framing is the only fresh angle.
rationales.brand_fit: Claims are properly hedged ('may help', 'supporting'), no hypey words, CTA ties directly to the supplement-tracking feature rather than vague app promotion.
rationales.predicted_performance: High save potential from the actionable MK-7 + D3 pairing tip, but shares will be limited by the topic's intermediate-knowledge floor.
